programme.title: Art. In The Shadow of War
programme.desc: In the midst of war, where silence and destruction often prevail, art rises as a powerful form of expression. This documentary series explores how artists navigate conflict, using creativity to document reality, preserve culture, and inspire hope. Through intimate stories, studio moments, and reflections on loss and resilience, it reveals how art becomes both a refuge and a form of resistance. Blending personal journeys with broader cultural context, the series highlights the enduring strength of human creativity in the darkest of times.

programme.title: To See the Bottom
programme.desc: The documentary analyzes the global consequences of the Kakhovka hydroelectric power station explosion, which became a continental-scale disaster. The film provides answers to complex questions: from the technical reasons for the destruction of reinforced concrete structures to the ecological collapse in the Black Sea. Viewers will see unique findings of scientists at the bottom of the former reservoir and learn about the irreversible losses of Ukrainian flora and fauna. In turn, the station management reveals for the first time the details of the last hours before the disaster and predicts the future of the drained territories.

programme.title: The Historical Background
programme.desc: The documentary project "The History of the Question" reveals the secret pages of the past to explain the logic of modern war. Through the analysis of declassified archives and the opinions of experts - from historians to military analysts - the project explores the roots of Russia's imperial policy and Ukraine's centuries-old resistance. This is a detailed analysis of how history is repeating itself today and what mechanisms of destruction of the Ukrainian people have been hidden behind the scenes of the Kremlin for decades.

programme.title: Art. In The Shadow of War
programme.desc: In the midst of war, where silence and destruction often prevail, art rises as a powerful form of expression. This documentary series explores how artists navigate conflict, using creativity to document reality, preserve culture, and inspire hope. Through intimate stories, studio moments, and reflections on loss and resilience, it reveals how art becomes both a refuge and a form of resistance. Blending personal journeys with broader cultural context, the series highlights the enduring strength of human creativity in the darkest of times.

programme.title: Sky. Unique Frames of the Work of Ukrainian Pilots
programme.desc: Tape dedicated to the aces of Ukrainian aviation , whose work became a shield for the entire countries . Film unites testimony crews helicopters and airplanes - from navigators to commanders who went through the hell of operations in Mariupol , in Zmiyino and in the skies over the Kherson region . This a story about how personal skill pilots decided the fate of entire regions : from fire support for the landing until evacuation wounded . For reasons security heroes remain behind the scenes until the end wars .

programme.title: Pieskāriens
programme.desc: Romantisks un saviļņojošs stāsts, kas aptver vairākus gadu desmitus un kontinentus. Viena vīrieša emocionāls ceļojums, kurā viņš cenšas atrast savu pirmo mīlestību, kas pazuda pirms 50 gadiem.

programme.title: Stabilizators 3: Pēdējā nodaļa
programme.desc: Trilleris ar Denzelu Vašingtonu un Dakotu Feningu. Pēc darba gaitu beigām valdības specvienībā Roberts Makols pielicis lielas pūles, lai samierinātos ar šausminošajām pagātnē paveiktajām lietām. Mierinājumu viņš rod, aizstāvot apspiestos un vājākos. Negaidīti, Itālijas dienvidos sajuties kā mājās, viņš atklāj, ka viņa jaunos draugus kontrolē vietējās mafijas vadoņi. Kad notikumi uzņem bīstamu kursu, Makols zina, kas viņam jādara, - jākļūst par drauga aizstāvi, stājoties pretī mafijai.

programme.title: Pati dzīve
programme.desc: Stāsts par dzīvi un sarežģījumiem, par šaubām un mīlestību. Koledžas studenti Vils un Ebija iemīlas viens otrā, apprecas un gatavojas sava pirmā bērna nākšanai pasaulē. Abu ņujorkiešu izvēles rada atskaņas, kas atbalsojas pāri okeānam un saved viņus ar cilvēkiem Seviļā, Spānijā - viņu vidū arī kāda problēmu nomākta sieviete, vīrietis ar savu mazmazmeitu, bagāts zemju īpašnieks un plantāciju pārvaldnieks.

programme.title: Naktsmītne
programme.desc: Topošā sieva ar diviem sava līgavaiņa bērniem apmetusies brīvdienu namā kādā attālā ciematā. Attiecībām atsalstot, sāk risināties dīvaini un biedējoši notikumi.

programme.title: Pusotrs spiegs
programme.desc: Kelvins Džoiners (Kevins Hārts) skolas laikā bija populārais puisis. Divdesmit gadus vēlāk viņš ir veiksmīgs grāmatvedis, kuru pārsteidz ziņa no Boba Stouna. Izrādās, ka patiesībā viņš ir Robijs Vīrdikts (Dveins Džonsons) – apsmietais tīnis viņa skolā. Bobs ir trenējies divdesmit gadus un šobrīd ir izcils CIP aģents. Viņš algo Kelvinu, lai ar viņa grāmatvedības prasmju palīdzību izsekotu ierīci, kura ASV spiegošanas jomā var radīt jucekli. Dīvainais pāris sastopas ar pārspēku, taču viņiem sanāk arī daži varoņdarbi.

programme.title: Nejaukais es
programme.desc: Superļaundaris Gru ir izmests no darba, jo neapturēja jaunāko cilvēces apdraudētāju. Viņš zaudē dzīvesprieku, bet to atgūst, kad uzzina, ka viņa neredzētais dvīņubrālis Dru vēlas viņu satikt. Gru ar ģimeni dodas uz brāļa grezno dzīvesvietu. Brāļi kopā uzsāks cīņu pret Baltazaru Bretu, kurš bērnībā bija slavenība, taču tagad kļuvis par superļaundari, kurš terorizē pasauli. Minioni uzsāk protesta streiku pret to, ka Gru vispār neinteresē iespēja valdīt pār pasauli.

programme.title: Kā Grinčs nozaga Ziemassvētkus
programme.desc: Vūvila ir maza, brīnumaina pilsētiņa, kas atrodas sniegpārsliņā. Visiem Vūvivas iedzīvotājiem ļoti patīk Ziemassvētki. Taču pilsētiņas tuvumā mīt Grinčs – ļoti nejauks radījums, kuram riebjas gan Ziemassvētki, gan arī vūvilieši, jo tie savulaik viņu izstūmuši no sava vidus. Redzot, kā viņi priecājas un gaida svētkus, Grinčs nolemj nozagt visas Ziemassvētku dāvanas. Bet varbūt kādai mazai meitenītei izdosies sadraudzēties ar Grinču un likt viņam mainīt savus plānus?

programme.title: Žanna Dibarī. Karaļa favorīte
programme.desc: Stāsts par karaļa Luija XV pēdējo oficiālo mīļāko Dibarī kundzi.

programme.title: Meklēšana
programme.desc: Kad pazūd Deivida Kima 16 gadus vecā meita, viņš pirmoreiz dzīvē iedziļinās meitas sociālo tīklu pasaulē, kura atklāj daudz vairāk, nekā sākotnēji šķita... Filma uzdod tiešus un neērtus jautājums, kas attiecināmu uz ikvienu, – cik daudz no sevis mēs mūsdienās uzticam sociālajiem tīkliem? Ko tie par mums stāsta, un kā ar mums ir iespējams manipulēt?

programme.title: Kapteinis Zobenzobs un burvju briljants
programme.desc: Ļaunais princis Megans Hans no džungļiem un Karību jūras pirāts kapteinis Zobenzobs jau sen dzen maģiskā briljanta pēdas. Tas nav parasts dārgakmens. Pusnaktī tas spēj piepildīt viskvēlāko vēlēšanos, lai kāda tā būtu. Visi meklējumi "kaķim zem astes", taču tad, klejodams pa džungļiem, burvju dārgakmeni nejauši ierauga mazais Marks.

programme.title: Apslēptās karaļvalsts sargi
programme.desc: Mērija Ketrīna atgriežas sava ekscentriskā tēva namā, taču zinātnieka nemitīgie centieni atrast tuvējā mežā sīciņu civilizāciju sabojā abu attiecības. Tomēr drīz vien nāvīgi ievainotā meža karaliene Tara nobur Mēriju un uztic viņai nogādāt drošībā trauku ar jauno karalieni. Kopā ar pieredzējušu lapu karotāju, diviem delverīgiem gliemjiem un jaunu karstgalvi Mērija piekrīt veikt šo uzdevumu. Kad uzbrūk ļaunie spēki, kurus vada Mandreiks, draugiem būs jāapvienojas, lai izglābtu savu pasauli.

programme.title: Tusnīte
programme.desc: Trīs draudzeņu vidū Bjanka ir visatšķirīgākā – gandrīz neredzama. Pasniedzēji neatceras viņas vārdu, un skolasbiedri – nesveicina. Bjankai pašai liekas, ka viss ir kārtībā, bet bērnības draugs skolas smukulītis Vess atklāj, kāds ir meitenes patiesais statuss nežēlīgajā skolas hierarhijā. Pateicoties puisim, Bjanka nolemj mainīt dzīvi. Taču meitenes apņemšanos apdraud skolas skaistule Medisona, kuras nākotnes plānos ietilpst dalība kādā realitātes šovā, tāpēc jau laikus viņa iejūtas lomā, katru savas ikdienas soli dokumentējot ar mobilo telefonu un sociālajos tīklos audzējot "biezu ādu". Viņasprāt, tikai nejauks cilvēks var sasniegt panākumus.

programme.title: Kungfu Panda
programme.desc: Po (Džeks Bleks) satiek savu sen pazudušo tēvu Lī (Braiens Kranstons), un abi dodas uz rezervātu, kurā sastop dažus smieklīgus ekscentriķus. Tomēr, kad uzrodas noslēpumainais ļaundaris Kajs (Džeikejs Simonss) - ļauns bullis, kurš zog kung fu meistaru dzīvības spēku - Po ir jāapmāca savi neveiklie sugas brāļi kung fu kaujas mākslā.

programme.title: Zosāda
programme.desc: Pusaudzis Zaks ir sarūgtināts, ka kopā ar mammu viņam no Ņujorkas jāpārceļas uz necilu pilsētiņu, kurā visdrīzāk nekas interesants nenotiek. Tomēr katram mākonim ir zelta maliņa, arī šim – tieši kaimiņos Zakam dzīvo apburoša meitene Hanna. Piedevām drīz vien atklājas, ka Hannas tēvs ir pazīstamais rakstnieks, populārās grāmatu sērijas "Zosāda" autors Roberts Stains. Atklājas arī Roberta talanta noslēpums – monstri, kas "Zosādu" padarījuši tik veiksmīgu, patiešām dzīvo rakstnieka iedomu pasaulē. Nejauši Zaks izlaiž šos monstrus brīvībā, un tie sāk terorizēt pilsētiņu. Kurš nu viņus savaldīs?

programme.title: Brīvsoļa meklētājs
programme.desc: Stāsts par aizbēgušu pāri, kas devušies neaizmirstamā ceļojumā savā vecajā kempinga automašīnā ar nosaukumu "The Leisure Seeker".

programme.title: Bestsellers
programme.desc: Untumains pensionēts rakstnieks negribīgi sāk piedalīties savas pēdējās grāmatas veicināšanas kampaņā, lai izpalīdzētu jaunai izdevējai.

programme.title: Kaķu mīlis
programme.desc: Koledžas studente Margo piestrādā nelielā kinoteātrī, kur iepazīstas ar biežu tā apmeklētāju, par sevi vecāko Robertu. Pāri letei aizsāktais flirts pārtop nepārtrauktā čatošanā. Kad abi nonāk līdz randiņam, Margo atklāj, ka dzīvē satiktais Roberts itin nemaz neatbilst tam Robertam, ar kuru viņa flirtējusi īsziņās. Skarbs vēstījums par dzimumu dalījumu, ķepurošanos cauri modernās randiņošanas staignājam un to, kādas bīstamas īpašības mēs mēdzam piedēvēt cilvēkiem otrpus mūsu telefoniem.

programme.title: Ferdinands
programme.desc: Ferdinands ir pats labsirdīgākais bullis visā Spānijā. Neskatoties uz iespaidīgajiem izmēriem un milzu spēku, viņš jau kopš bērnības neizrādīja sevišķu interesi par badīšanos ar saviem sugas brāļiem. Nejaušības dēļ Ferdinands nokļūst to vidū, kuri tiek izvēlēti, lai piedalītos buļļu cīņās Madridē. Tagad Ferdinandam nāksies aizstāvēt savus miermīlīgos dzīves uzskatus un atgādināt pārējiem, ka grūtību priekšā galvenais ir palikt, kāds tu esi. Jo tikai tā tu spēsi izmainīt pasauli sev apkārt.

programme.title: Palaidnīgā feja
programme.desc: 337 gadus jaunajai zobu fejai Violetai maģija nešķiet īpaši aizraujoša, tāpēc viņa vienīgā nespēj nokārtot eksāmenu, lai iegūtu kristālu, kas fejām ļauj iekļūt cilvēku pasaulē. Violeta neļauj skumjām vaļu, nozog kristālu citai fejai un nokļūst 12 gadus vecās bārenītes Maksijas istabā. Tomēr, ak vai! Kristāls saplīst, un nu Violeta ir iesprostota cilvēku pasaulē! Kopā ar Maksiju viņa meklē atpakaļceļu un atklāj savu patieso aicinājumu.

programme.title: Džumandži: Laipni lūgti džungļos
programme.desc: Četri vidusskolēni atrod vecu spēļu konsoli ar līdz šim neredzētu videospēli džumandži. Viņi iesaistās šajā spēlē, kas norisinās džungļos, un iemiesojas pašu izraudzītajos avataros. Jaunieši apjauš, ka džumandži ir kas vairāk par spēli, tā ir cīņa par izdzīvošanu. Lai uzvarētu spēlē, viņiem jādodas bīstamākajā piedzīvojumā mūžā, jāatklāj Alana Periša pirms 20 gadiem atstātās pēdas un jāmaina priekšstats pašiem par sevi, pretējā gadījumā viņi paliks ieslēgti spēlē uz visiem laikiem...

programme.title: Ķieģeli pa ķieģelītim
programme.desc: Animācijas filma "Lego" klucīšu stilā par Farela Viljamsa dzīvi. Filmā, kurā galvenās lomas ierunājis pats Farels Viljamss (Pharrell Williams), kā arī Kendriks Lamārs (Kendrick Lamar) un Džastins Timberleiks (Justin Timberlake), ķieģelīti pa ķieģelītim tiek pārskatīta mākslinieka karjera.

programme.title: Zaķu skola: Misija ''Olas''
programme.desc: Īsi pirms Lieldienām svinīgā rituālā maģiskā Zelta ola palīdz noskaidrot zaķu čempionus. Un pirmo reizi zaķu skolas vēsturē izvēlēts arī pilsētas zaķis - un tas ir Makss! Vaļoties Maksam vairs itin nemaz nav laika, jo viņam kopā ar Lieldienu zaķa draugiem jāpilnveido savas prasmes. Tomēr pirms paša pirmā treniņa zaķu maģiskā spēka avots Zelta ola kļūst melna. Pie vainas ir bandas vadonis Leo, kurš nevēlas, lai Lieldienas notiku. Ko nu?!

programme.title: Krūdi
programme.desc: Aizvēsturiska piedzīvojumu komēdija par pasaules pirmo ģimeni, kura dodas unikālā ceļojumā, kad viņu dzimtā ala tiek iznīcināta. Ceļojot pa elpu aizraujošajām ainavām, Krūdi atklāj pasakainu, jaunu vietu, kur mīt vēl neredzētas būtnes. Viņu pasaules uztvere mainās uz visiem laikiem.

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Mis Moksi
programme.desc: Mis Moksi, pieradināta kaķenīte, brīvdienu laikā apmaldās, un viņai nākas atrast ceļu atpakaļ uz mājām, ceļojot cauri Dienvideiropai kopā ar, kaķa skatījumā, visnepatīkamākajām radībām, kādas vien iespējamas, – komisku suni un vecu, gudru putnu. Šī ceļojuma laikā viņa paplašina savu skatījumu uz dzīvi un atklāj patieso draudzības nozīmi.

programme.title: Lemāna-'66: Lielais izaicinājums
programme.desc: Filmas sižets balstīts patiesos notikumus un atgādina par autosporta vēstures spriedzes pilnām lapaspusēm. Notikumi risinās 60. gados, kad konstruktoru grupa, kuru vadīja Kerols Šelbijs, kopā ar britu sacīkšu braucēju Kenu Mailsu uzbūvēja vēl nebijušu "Ford" sporta automašīnu un meta izaicinājumu Lemānas 24 stundu sacīkšu favorītam "Ferrari".

programme.title: Gran Turismo. No spēles līdz trasei
programme.desc: Pēc Jana Mardenborova dzīves stāsta uzņemtā filma ir patiess stāsts par to, kā pusaugu "Gran Turismo" geimeris, pateicoties savām spēles prasmēm, piepilda savu lielāko sapni un uzvar virknē "Nissan" sacīkšu un kļūst par profesionālu sacīkšu braucēju.

programme.title: Jauns sākums
programme.desc: Greta un viņas draugs Deivs ir muzikanti un dziesmu autori, kopā jau ilgus gadus kopš koledžas laikiem. Brīdī, kad Deivs saņem piedāvājumu ierakstīt albumu no lielas ierakstu kompānijas, viņi pārvācas uz dzīvi Ņujorkā. Jauniegūtās slavas savaldzināts, Deivs pamet Gretu un uzsāk savu jauno mūziķa karjeru. Gretas dzīvē pozitīvu pavērsienu ienes nejauša satikšanās ar Denu, izbijušu ierakstu kompānijas menedžeri. Brīdī, kad Dens ierauga Gretu muzicējam nomaļā pilsētas klubā, viņu vienā mirklī apbur meitenes muzikālais talants un šarms. Līdz ar šo nejaušo sastapšanos abu dzīves ir nesaraujami saistītas, ļaujot sadziedēt brūces un sasniegt mērķus gan profesionālajā karjerā, gan privātajā dzīvē. Jauns dzīves sākums izstāstīts uz Ņujorkas vasaras fona.

programme.title: Brutālists
programme.desc: Bēgdams no pēckara Eiropas, arhitekts Lāslo Tots ierodas Amerikā, lai sāktu jaunu dzīvi, atrastu darbu un gaidītu sievu Eržēbeti, kura cenšas izkļūt no Austrumeiropas. Svešajā un jaunajā valstī Lāslo apmetas Filadelfijā, kur bagātais un ietekmīgais rūpnieks Harisons Lī Van Būrens pamana viņa talantu. Lāslo ir jāatrod savs ceļš jaunajā pasaulē, kurā valda citi noteikumi. Amerikāņu sapnis šķiet iluzors, panākumi un slava maksā lielu cenu…

programme.title: Riteņbraukšana: .. Tour de Hongrie. Apskats
programme.desc: The Tour de Hongrie (English: Tour of Hungary) is a professional road bicycle stage race organized in Hungary since 1925.

programme.desc: The National Basketball Association composes of thirty teams across North America for men who are professional in this specific sport. programme.title: Cīņu sports: Glory Kickboxing 2025. Glory 108: 4-man Last Featherweight Standing
programme.desc: Glory is the premiere kick-boxing series in the world.

programme.title: ATP 250 Libema Open. Singles, Round
programme.desc: ATP 250 's-Hertogenbosch, known as the Libéma Open, is an annual professional tennis tournament held in Rosmalen, near the city of 's-Hertogenbosch in the Netherlands. It is part of both the ATP and WTA tours and is played on outdoor grass courts at the Autotron Rosmalen complex.

Neighborhood Watch
programme.desc: From unanticipated failures to good intentions gone wrong, life is most entertaining when nothing goes according to plan.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: Finding the perfect home is never easy, but these aspirational house hunters don't plan on making it any easier for themselves. Meet the budding designers, builders and decorators determined to start from scratch and take on the mega projects all for themselves. Each episode features a new group of hopefuls looking to find cheap run-down houses with the aim of rapidly transforming them into their dream family homes. As families and friends embark on their mission to construct their future homes, follow their progress as they encounter all of excitement, stress and chaos that comes with home renovation.

programme.title: Anything But Gray
programme.desc: Gray takes on a mid-century design, expanding a family's 1950s home. She balances its earthy tones with her signature whimsy and bold colour.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A Texas want to leave Dallas, Fort Worth for the relaxing beaches of South Padre Island. Since the birth of their daughter, they've realised now is the time to start living their dreams and enjoy raising their child.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters: All-Stars
programme.desc: An artist relocates from Hawaii and looks for a new home in downtown Indianapolis. Property expert Mina Starsiak Hawk helps her find the right place.

programme.title: House Hunters: All-Stars
programme.desc: Realtor and construction expert Rico Leon helps a newly divorced mum find a home in downtown Denver. She wants move-in ready with old-time charm.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas
programme.desc: Real estate agents Bristol and Aubrey Marunde welcome you to the City of Second Chances as they host this Las Vegas spin-off of the popular Flip or Flop reality home improvement show. Out in the Nevada sunshine, this husband-and-wife team buy up neglected homes in need of a bit of love and attention to renovate them so they can be sold at a profit. But like many things in Las Vegas – it's a gamble. They're never entirely sure of the challenges they face with the home until they start to restore it. MMA fighter Bristol is involved in overhauling the properties whilst Aubrey is in charge of style and design. But will their efforts pay off and will they hit the jackpot?

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A Brooklyn-born woman loves NYC but has grown tired of the urban chaos. After many summers of vacationing in East Hampton with her friends, she's ready to purchase her own stylish island retreat where she can relax with her dog.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: High school sweethearts are ready to move their family and waffle business to beautiful Emerald Isle, NC. They want a four-bedroom house close to the beach, while their two kids want a backyard skate park and waterslide.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: A young Arkansas couple has dreamed about living on the lake that they both grew up coming to, Lake Windsor. Now they are making that dream a reality and have bought a house on the lake, but it needs a lot of work. They have a pretty hefty budget, to turn their dated lake house into a spacious lake home, now they just need their friends, Dave and Jenny, to help to make it happen. This is one of Dave and Jenny's biggest lake home renovations to date, but they're up for the challenge to create a modern lake home oasis with their first all black kitchen, an outdoor kitchen space and spa-like main bathroom retreat for their friends and their twin toddlers.

programme.title: Desert Flippers
programme.desc: It's no surprise that buyers are passing by a property that sits at end of an airport runway, but with low inventory in the desert, Lindsey and Eric decide to take a risk and purchase the home. The key to the flip is blowing away buyers with a new open concept inside and massive entertaining and living space outside. In real estate, location is everything, though, and Lindsey and Eric hope their upgraded design is enough to overcome this home's unfortunate downside.

programme.title: Desert Flippers
programme.desc: Wisconsin transplants Eric and Lindsey Bennett are transforming sunny Palm Springs, California one dilapidated house at a time. Renovating 20 properties a year while raising two small children is no small feat, and this couple takes it in stride. But when you go behind the walls of houses that live in triple-digit heat, you never know what you might find, scorpions, rattlesnakes, black widows and even squatters. In each episode of Desert Flippers , Eric and Lindsey search out a diamond in the rough, but they might find something that's just plain rough.

programme.title: Desert Flippers
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey Bennett take on a property in disrepair that has been deemed a tear-down by the seller. The flippers think they can salvage the home and give it new life, but the more they uncover, the more frightening this flip becomes. A rotting carport, a damaged roof and severe mold send the renovation costs skyrocketing and leave the couple wondering if they should have listened to the seller and torn the whole thing down.

programme.title: Desert Flippers
programme.desc: Lindsey and Eric seem to be the only ones willing to take on a challenging fire-damaged home with a low price tag and high market risk. What looks like a few charred walls turns out to be a much larger issue that takes a chunk out of the profit when major roof repairs are required. The flippers have to make some hard decisions on design if they want to attract buyers while staying under budget and on schedule.

programme.title: Backed by the Bros
programme.desc: Jonathan and Drew must choose between a rookie investor way in over his head on a massive, million dollar flip, and a widow who's been sitting for years on prime real estate, all while racing to help a previous investor get his triplex back on the market.

programme.title: Backed by the Bros
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan will be choosing between two potential investment properties. After assessing the real estate, meeting the owners, and discussing their options, the Bros will then decide which property to back.

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Vintage Flip
programme.desc: Jessie and Tina Rodriguez are living the American dream, taking their passion for vintage homes and turning them into successful flips. In each episode of Vintage Flip , this creative couple will find, buy, restore and market a vintage home. You never know what might be hiding behind hundred year-old walls!

programme.title: Fix My Flip
programme.desc: Licensed real estate agent Page Turner meets with struggling flippers to tour mid-flip properties that are in hopeless financial situations. Page invests her own money to help the floundering flippers fix everything from blown budgets and mismanaged schedules to uninspired upgrades and lackluster design.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life
programme.desc: A couple who spent their honeymoon in Greece decide to return to live on the island of Paros. The family of four want a traditional Greek style home with sea views and outdoor space, but it must be close to the school.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life
programme.desc: A couple are moving to Greece to enjoy the food, beaches and lifestyle. They need to find a compromise between an apartment by the sea, close to a rail line near her daughter's school, and a house with outdoor space and privacy.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: A couple who loves the mid-century modern style thought buying a 1970s home made sense, but a pile of renovation projects has them calling for help. Dave and Jenny get to work bringing their groovy pad and party-ready pool house back to its former glory.

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: The Renovator
programme.desc: Marcus Lemonis will rescue frustrated families who have no idea where to begin to renovate a house that no longer meets their needs. During the process, Marcus will dig deep to determine the root of the clients' issues, provide solutions that transform their homes into ideal spaces and help mend their strained relationships. Ultimately, each family will get a stunning renovation and the tools they need to thrive in the home they used to love.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: Jo finalises the design for a showstopping staircase in the entry as other custom pieces are installed, and Chip works on two big outdoor features.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: The Lakehouse
programme.desc: To celebrate 10 years of Fixer Upper, Jo plans a big surprise for Chip on reveal day with special guests Tim Tebow and Robert Griffin III.

programme.desc: When this widow purchased this house with her husband years ago, neither of them knew what life had in store. Now, she wants to fulfill her late husband's dream to transform their outdated house into a beautiful, modern farmhouse home. Dave and Jenny help bring that dream to life for the woman and her two teenage sons by incorporating one of their favorite pastimes, a karaoke cabinet in their den. They also create a cool, custom basketball court for the sons and a modern outdoor entertaining space where this single mom can gather with her family and friends for years to come.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Beautiful and innovative home renos inspired by stunning natural surroundings get a spotlight in the new HGTV series, Building Roots. Starring husband and wife duo Ben and Cristi Dozier, the series features the couple as they build, design and renovate properties in their dreamy hometown of Pagosa Springs, Colorado. During the series, Ben and Cristi produce one-of-a-kind, highly personalized work that always exceeds their clients' expectations.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Beautiful and innovative home renos inspired by stunning natural surroundings get a spotlight in the new HGTV series, Building Roots. Starring husband and wife duo Ben and Cristi Dozier, the series features the couple as they build, design and renovate properties in their dreamy hometown of Pagosa Springs, Colorado. During the series, Ben and Cristi produce one-of-a-kind, highly personalized work that always exceeds their clients' expectations.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: After living in Nashville for the last 15 years, this country music singer is looking to put down roots in small town Mississippi. She has set her budget and has provided Ben and Erin with a wish list that includes a historic home with a space for entertaining and a spa-like master bath. She's presented with two homes: a classic craftsman bungalow with a large but rough backyard and a large dated house with no kitchen. Ben and Erin deliver a stunning home that includes a manicured outdoor entertainment space and a luxury spa master bath.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Build Me Up
programme.desc: Forgetting your ex isn't so easy when your whole house reminds you of them. Everywhere you turn, there's that horrible wall paper they insisted on getting, pictures of your holidays together, they even painted your front door their favourite colour. That's where designer Orlando Soria comes in. Orlando considers himself somewhat a break-up expert, and he's determined to give these newly single clients' houses the new lease of life that they so desperately need, allowing them to move on from their ex.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life
programme.desc: After many moves due to his military career, a couple decides to settle on the island of Crete in Greece. While she would like a traditional home with pool and views, he prefers a more central location.

programme.title: Mediterranean Life
programme.desc: Few places share the magical sparkle of the Mediterranean coastline, with many dreaming of one day purchasing property in this idyllic region. This reality series follows potential homeowners from the US as they look to find their dream property on the Med. From the extravagant luxuries of the French Riviera to the slower pace of life on the island of Sicily, each destination is engulfed in picturesque beaches, turquoise waters and unparalleled culture.

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Now that their kids are older, a family is moving back to their roots in Arkansas. Dave and Jenny step in to help turn their large country home with lots of acreage into a cozy farmhouse where they can focus on "unplugging" with more family time together.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Celebrity IOU
programme.desc: Follow an array of Hollywood superstars as they embark on an exciting and heart-warming mission, expressing their gratitude to the most important people in their lives by surprising them with huge and incredible home renovations. There to help them on their adventure are twin brothers Drew and Jonathan Scott. Some of the amazing people featured on the programme are Rebel Wilson, Bred Pitt, Jeremy Renner, Michael Buble, Allison Janney, LeAnn Rimes, Kevin Hart, and many others.

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. This American reality series follows prospective homebuyers as they venture into this Central American paradise to find their dream property, with the help of expert realtors. Whatever their reasons for moving; sun, sand, surf or simply a change of scenery, the realtors aid the buyers every step of the way, helping them to locate ideal properties that they can either move into or enjoy as a holiday home. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Mexico Life

programme.title: Wild Vacation Rentals
programme.desc: D'Arcy Carden and Sherry Cola explore outrageous rentals across the central US, including a racing-themed house and an underground missile silo.

programme.title: Wild Vacation Rentals
programme.desc: D'Arcy Carden and Sherry Cola explore wild rentals across the Southeast, including a camera-themed cabin and a Moroccan-inspired treehouse.

programme.title: Izzy Does It
programme.desc: Izzy and the Battres family tackle a project with a homeowner who's terrified that a renovation will ruin the charming old house she loves. And when Izzy resists Bri's social marketing strategies, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A couple sets out to restore a downtown apartment to help revitalise their hometown. But with two young children, renovating on a budget is not easy!

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck as this relocated Texas family of five painstakingly restores a century-old farmhouse, plank by plank.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is excited to leave the busy city of Atlanta, GA, for a laid-back lifestyle on Ono Island, AL. After years of saving and planning, they are finally ready to make the move and find their dream home with a water view.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. Ensuring each person gets what they want, they are introduced to a number of properties that meet their ultimate dream home in the hopes that they will indeed find the one. With 101 episodes, Beachfront Bargain Hunt introduces you to the life that can be led, without breaking to bank, to live a life by the sea!

programme.title: House Hunters: All-Stars
programme.desc: With their wedding around the corner, Veronica Valencia helps a Los Angeles couple with competing styles and priorities find their first home.

programme.title: House Hunters: All-Stars
programme.desc: Page Turner helps a small business owner fulfil her dream of living beachside. But she only has 30 days to help her find a new place.

programme.title: Flip or Flop Vegas
programme.desc: Real estate agents Bristol and Aubrey Marunde welcome you to the City of Second Chances as they host this Las Vegas spin-off of the popular Flip or Flop reality home improvement show. Out in the Nevada sunshine, this husband-and-wife team buy up neglected homes in need of a bit of love and attention to renovate them so they can be sold at a profit. But like many things in Las Vegas – it's a gamble. They're never entirely sure of the challenges they face with the home until they start to restore it. MMA fighter Bristol is involved in overhauling the properties whilst Aubrey is in charge of style and design. But will their efforts pay off and will they hit the jackpot?

programme.title: Greatest Mysteries with Laurence Fishburne
programme.desc: Investigate a wide range of historically compelling topics and the mysteries surrounding each including the Titanic, D.B. Cooper, Roswell, John Wilkes Booth, and more. Each program within the franchise will showcase fresh, new evidence and perspectives including never-before-released documents to the general public, personal diaries and DNA evidence to unearth brand-new information about these infamous and enigmatic chapters in history.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.desc: Investigate a wide range of historically compelling topics and the mysteries surrounding each including the Titanic, D.B. Cooper, Roswell, John Wilkes Booth, and more. programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A&E presents the new original real-life series "Storage Wars," which follows professional buyers and their teams as they scour repossessed storage units in search of hidden treasure. Part gamblers, part detectives, these auction pros have found everything from coffins to the world's most valuable comic book collection, paying as little as ten dollars for items valued in the millions. Each episode of "Storage Wars" follows a group of bidders as they get a quick peek inside the units, aided only by the beam of a flashlight. They then must assess on the spot if the unit is worth a bid and how high they will actually go to grasp the gold. The high-stakes fun begins as we see if the resulting buy is full of mostly trash... or true treasure. Driven by Dan Dotson, one of the most successful and outrageous auctioneers in the country, the cast of buyers is as colorful and varied as the treasures they uncover.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The world's most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: World War II was the largest, and deadliest, conflict in human history. From 1939 until 1945, more than fifty nations engaged in harrowing combat-and during that time, a number of intriguing and persistent mysteries were born. Nearly eighty years later, curious stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly-advanced technology remain unexplained. Can new information help us better understand the strangest tales of the Second World War?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The War At Sea. The story of how America's battle to control the seas against the terrifying German U-boats in the Atlantic and Japan's fearsome Navy in the Pacific ultimately turns the tide of the war.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: After the attack on Pearl Harbor, Japanese forces sweep across Southeast Asia. On Guadalcanal, United States Marines are given the bloody task of stopping their relentless advance.

programme.title: Hitler: A Life in Pictures
programme.desc: Once elected as Chancellor in 1933, Hitler and his party used the latest propaganda techniques of photography, film and radio to mould Germany in their own image. At the heart of the new Germany was the carefully crafted image of the Fuhrer.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: World War II was the largest, and deadliest, conflict in human history. From 1939 until 1945, more than fifty nations engaged in harrowing combat-and during that time, a number of intriguing and persistent mysteries were born. Nearly eighty years later, curious stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly-advanced technology remain unexplained. Can new information help us better understand the strangest tales of the Second World War?

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: The blue marble we call Earth remains in large part a mystery to the 8 billion people who live on it. How did Earth come to exist, and what are the secrets of its survival? How long will humans be able to call it "home"?

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
programme.desc: We've been fascinated by our nearest planetary neighbor, Venus. It's about the same size as our world, covered in massive volcanoes and poisonous clouds of acid rain. Is Venus our evil twin or a warning about what Earth will become in the future?

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The world's most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: This unique documentary series explores what the planet would look like if all human life diappeared. With comment and opinion coming from scientists, engineers and other experts, this show speculates on how a lack of human intervention would impact on the environment and the other animal species. The show does not provide any explanation as to why humans have vanished from the face of the Earth but does surmise that human infrastructure is still present along with pets and domesticated livestock. Each episode explores what would happen to specific structures such as skyscrapers, bridges and dams or details the impact on human remains, artefacts and other objects. Some real-life abandoned locations are discussed and the show also uses CGI dramatisations to depict how the situation would look after one day, one week, one year, 10 years, 15 years, 25 years, 50 years, 100 years, 200 years, etc.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs' Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the world's greatest empires.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Where Did It Come From?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the history of Earth's greatest man-made structures and creations. Where Did It Come From? reveals the earliest examples of brilliance and ingenuity from past pioneers. From the Roman highway project; a civil engineering feat establishing a network of unprecedented highways, to Egypt's iconic structures, this series reveals the incomprehensible ides brought to life by magnificent minds, and in some cases, brutal slavery. Join host Michael Guillen as he dives into this fascinating world of both civil and social engineering, born out of ideas we still use today.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Ancient Discoveries
programme.desc: Have a look at the technologies from the past. You will be surprised to find out in what extent ancient knowledge influences modern technology. The truth about the past is much more complicated and fascinating than we imagine. This eye-opening series is filmed on location in Italy, Greece, Egypt, Holland, and England, and other locations of the world where historical events actually happened, and with the help of computer animation ancient machines and mechanisms are reconstructed. As well the series uses contributions from archaeologists and other experts, footage of historical sites and artifacts and dramatized reconstructions.

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: Documentary series that in each episode explains the heroic and tragic life of various figures from Greek and Norse mythologies - the most powerful monsters, heroes and Gods, including Thor, Hercules, Beowulf, Minotaur, Odysseus and Zeus. Was ancient Greece's greatest hero Hercules a real person? What inspired the Minotaur's labyrinth? Did Odysseus's famous journey really happen? This series will answer these and many other questions, and experts will connect the myths we all know to actual historical events, and link the stories to mythologies of other cultures as well.

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: This unique documentary series explores what the planet would look like if all human life diappeared. With comment and opinion coming from scientists, engineers and other experts, this show speculates on how a lack of human intervention would impact on the environment and the other animal species. The show does not provide any explanation as to why humans have vanished from the face of the Earth but does surmise that human infrastructure is still present along with pets and domesticated livestock. Each episode explores what would happen to specific structures such as skyscrapers, bridges and dams or details the impact on human remains, artefacts and other objects. Some real-life abandoned locations are discussed and the show also uses CGI dramatisations to depict how the situation would look after one day, one week, one year, 10 years, 15 years, 25 years, 50 years, 100 years, 200 years, etc.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs' Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the world's greatest empires.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Where Did It Come From?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the history of Earth's greatest man-made structures and creations. Where Did It Come From? reveals the earliest examples of brilliance and ingenuity from past pioneers. From the Roman highway project; a civil engineering feat establishing a network of unprecedented highways, to Egypt's iconic structures, this series reveals the incomprehensible ides brought to life by magnificent minds, and in some cases, brutal slavery. Join host Michael Guillen as he dives into this fascinating world of both civil and social engineering, born out of ideas we still use today.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Ancient Discoveries
programme.desc: Have a look at the technologies from the past. You will be surprised to find out in what extent ancient knowledge influences modern technology. The truth about the past is much more complicated and fascinating than we imagine. This eye-opening series is filmed on location in Italy, Greece, Egypt, Holland, and England, and other locations of the world where historical events actually happened, and with the help of computer animation ancient machines and mechanisms are reconstructed. As well the series uses contributions from archaeologists and other experts, footage of historical sites and artifacts and dramatized reconstructions.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. programme.title: Mankind Decoded
programme.desc: Using dramatic reconstructions, this fascinating documentary series explores the evolution and advancement of the human race, dissecting the key events and changes that have affected and altered various civilisations. Each episode in this 12-part series focusses on a unique transformation of our ancestors, as they discovered more and more about the planet they inhabit. With expert historians offering explanations to these changes, the series reveals how powerful forces of nature compelled humans to adapt, the birth of war, the discovery of fire and metals, and the building of giant structures, among many others.

Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: The Tesla Files
programme.desc: Why were trunks belonging to genius inventor Nikola Tesla confiscated in 1943? Did they contain the plans for nearly free worldwide electricity, massive death rays, and other inventions out of the future? A new investigation driven by declassified CIA documents suggests a secret history of bitter rivalries, government conspiracies, Cold War and WW2 spycraft, extra-terrestrial communication, and amazing achievements of a truly gifted man – Nikola Tesla.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: oberts and Laidlaw have uncovered a fatal flaw in the Royal Navy's existing anti-U-Boat tactic 'Buttercup'. By wargaming different scenarios, they develop a countertactic of their own, codenamed 'Raspberry', in which a merchant convoy escorted by Royal Navy destroyers can lure in the wolfpack before surrounding and destroying it; in effect, playing the enemy at its own game. But the team now faces an uphill battle to try to convince Noble and his colleagues at the Admiralty that they hold the key to stopping the U-Boats in the Atlantic.

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: Japan, 1612: Legendary samurai Musashi meets arch rival Kojiro in a climactic duel. Modern-day warrior SFC Terry Schappert goes inside some of the most famous warrior cultures of all time to explore their weaponry, tactics and psyche.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs' Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the world's greatest empires.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Where Did It Come From?
programme.desc: Documentary series exploring the history of Earth's greatest man-made structures and creations. Where Did It Come From? reveals the earliest examples of brilliance and ingenuity from past pioneers. From the Roman highway project; a civil engineering feat establishing a network of unprecedented highways, to Egypt's iconic structures, this series reveals the incomprehensible ides brought to life by magnificent minds, and in some cases, brutal slavery. Join host Michael Guillen as he dives into this fascinating world of both civil and social engineering, born out of ideas we still use today.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt
programme.desc: As we all know, the initial verdict in a trial is not always the final outcome as many trial jury decisions are often overturned on appeal. However, the appeals process can take a significant amount of time to go through the system and also incur enormous costs on the individuals involved. This show follows the work of two investigators who re-examine the verdicts in contentious murder cases and assess the prospects of a successful appeal for the families of the people convicted of the crimes to determine if they should appeal or accept the verdict. Each episode traces the developments in the case, whether it be new evidence or witness testimony, which can then shed light on the innocence of the convicted person or show that, indeed, they are guilty of the crime and the verdict was correct.

programme.title: Murder In the Heartland
programme.desc: This series focuses on the dark underbelly of the American mid-west, its heartland. Each episode deals with a specific murder that's been commited in one of the small towns that make up this iconic region of the US with the locals enhancing the tales and bringing clues to our attention. The show includes interviews with the victim's family, friends, law enforcement officers and also provides dramatic reenactments to bring the stories to life. Episodes reveal true stories such as when an Oklahoma family's dog drops a human skull onto their porch and the police are called in to investigate; a bride-to-be who discovers her betrothed shot in the head in their living room; a beloved father, son and fiancee who is discovered beaten to death in his own driveway; and a devoted family man who diappears after his truck is set on fire.

programme.title: Still A Mystery
programme.desc: Just because a case is closed doesn't mean the truth has been revealed. Suicide or murder? Runaway or kidnapping? Accidental or premeditated? programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells true and often tragic stories of the crimes perpetrated on the internet and of deception and manipulation triggered by online interactions - from predators lurking behind Facebook profiles to maniacs searching for their victims in chat rooms. Series includes re-enactments, comments from law enforcement personnel, true-crime experts, psychologists and interviews from friends and families of the victims. Rare episodes feature victims who were extremely lucky to survive and are able to tell us what happened.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells true and often tragic stories of the crimes perpetrated on the internet and of deception and manipulation triggered by online interactions - from predators lurking behind Facebook profiles to maniacs searching for their victims in chat rooms. Rare episodes feature victims who were extremely lucky to survive and are able to tell us what happened.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery and People magazine partner to re-examine some of the most high profile crime cases in recent history. The one-hour series brings viewers tales of betrayal, buried secrets and unsung heroes, ripped from the pages of one of the nation's top weekly magazines. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with People's journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In American Detective, Kenda trades in his own case files to bring viewers astounding investigations from across the country, with each episode featuring a different homicide detective whose tireless efforts helped put a killer behind bars and bring justice for the victim.

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: Not only are they friendly, cuddly, kind and loyal, but man's best friend can also use their canine instincts to help law enforcement officials catch criminals. Using their remarkable sense of smell, which is up to 100,000 times more effective than that of humans, these policing pooches unearth deadly narcotics, smuggled goods such as ivory and even illegal immigrants. In this reality series we celebrate these canine crime fighters and the unbreakable bonds they have with their human handlers, showcasing their incredible abilities when out on call with UK police officers.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: As a single mother having overcome a battle with addiction, it's not easy for Charity Lee to raise her son, Paris, and daughter, Ella. Despite what appears to be a loving family and a sibling bond she could have only hoped for, she could never have foreseen the true monster her 13-year-old son was hiding within.

programme.title: Fatal Destination
programme.desc: A hotel room in New Orleans turns into a macabre scene: a man dead in a blood-filled hot tub, Bible pages plastered on walls, and a voodoo doll on the bed. CCTV footage reveals four goth strangers arriving with the victim hours earlier.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda

programme.title: Первые ласточки
programme.desc: У Кати появляется неожиданный поклонник. Но всех остальных ждут неприятности. Дэн узнаёт об ориентации Феди и требует плату за своё молчание. Вскрывается правда об интрижке Масло и Полины. Наступает день похорон, а загадок всё больше. Кто снял фото Полины с доски почёта и кто проник в её квартиру?

programme.title: Ольга
programme.desc: Главная героиня воспитывает двух детей от разных браков, заботится об отце-алкоголике и пытается наладить личную жизнь. Старшая дочь Анька учится в ПТУ, думает, что она единственный адекватный член семьи и в её жизни все будет по-другому, младший сын Тимофей, чей отец вернулся к первой семье в Азербайджан, считает, что он уже мужчина, хотя ему всего лишь 11 лет, отец Ольги, бывший футболист, крепко выпивает и постоянно врет, а сестра Ленка пытается жить за счет мужчин, в основном — женатых. Вечно спасая родственников от неприятностей, Ольга живет чужой жизнью и редко думает о себе — до тех пор, пока в нее не влюбляется молодой и положительный водитель газели "Ритуал" Гриша.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Хозяйка кафе авторской кухни "Уцхо" Лара Исаева — известный российский кинопродюсер с 30-летним стажем работы. Несколько лет назад она решила переехать из Москвы в родной город Тбилиси и начать свой небольшой бизнес. Каждое блюдо в меню — ее личный шедевр, например, "сырный кофе", "хлебный суп" или бургер в форме НЛО. Но кафе "Уцхо" давно стал и центром творчества молодых ребят, уехавших от войны в Грузию. Среди них российские режиссеры, актеры, просто увлеченные искусством люди. Так кухня и театр переплелись самым чудным образом, став популярным местом для многих переехавших жить в Тбилиси. А сама Лара Исаева уверена, что надо "жить вкусно".

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Средство от разлуки
programme.desc: Учительница музыки Катя знакомится с бизнесменом Владом. Мужчина красиво ухаживает, они начинают встречаться, и вскоре пара уже строит планы на дальнейшую счастливую жизнь, выбирает обручальные кольца. Катя не знает, что Влад давно женат...

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Средство от разлуки
programme.desc: Учительница музыки Катя знакомится с бизнесменом Владом. Мужчина красиво ухаживает, они начинают встречаться, и вскоре пара уже строит планы на дальнейшую счастливую жизнь, выбирает обручальные кольца. Катя не знает, что Влад давно женат...

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: В программе о том, как встречают Новый год в Армении. О традициях, обычаях и главное праздничной кухне. Какие блюда должны обязательно присутствовать на новогоднем столе и как их готовить. А также рассказ о том, какой нарядной выглядит армянская столица в преддверии Нового года. Центр города с замечательными парками, выставочными залами современного искусства,Вернисажем, модными клубами и новогодними ярмарками создает непередаваемую атмосферу древнего города, смело идущего в ногу со временем. Так же в программе знаменитый коньячный завод "Ной", рассказ о популярных марках армянского коньяка. И концерт живой легенды армянского джаза Левона Малхасяна .

programme.title: Моя звезда
programme.desc: Костя и Маша дружили со студенческих лет. И Костя был единственным, кто не замечал, что все эти годы Маша влюблена в него… Мечта девушки о взаимности гасла день за днем. И, наконец, она решила ничего больше не ждать и ответила на чувства своего давнего поклонника Кирилла. Счастливый Кирилл сделал ей предложение, вот только свадьба так и не состоялась - жених умер от сердечного приступа. И теперь Маше надо понять, что делать с тремя его детьми от первого брака. На Костю тоже сваливается беда: его названая мать тяжело больна и просит его позаботиться о своей воспитаннице Кристине. Костя забирает девушку с собой в Москву, еще не представляя, во что ввязался. У Кристины две мечты - стать звездой кинематографа и выйти замуж за олигарха. В итоге все выйдет совсем не так, как представлялось героям. Хотя, возможно, гораздо лучше.

programme.title: Орёл и Решка. Земляне
programme.desc: Michelle Andrade и Кирилл Макашов прилетели в Пакистан, чтобы познакомить тебя с уникальными землянами, которые совсем не похожи на нас. Пакистанцы едят из пакетов, а в школах учат на память Коран. Разрисовывают грузовики и моют коров на автомойках. Кирилл Макалов будет отдыхать с безлимитной картой и узнает, как живут богатые пакистанцы. А Michelle Andrade познакомится с простыми людьми, увидит их быт и традиции.

programme.title: Провинциальный детектив
programme.desc: Заведующая городской библиотекой Татьяна Дашкова и медсестра Ольга Брянцева живут в небольшом очаровательном городке с древней историей и дружат с детства. Образованность, начитанность и неиссякаемый интерес к жизни Татьяны, в сочетании с практичностью, находчивостью и живостью ума Ольги дают удивительные результаты. Их тандем способен разобраться в самых запутанных ситуациях и выяснить истинные мотивы любого преступления, которых случается немало в этом, кажущемся спокойным, городке. Главное — внимание к мелочам и деталям, а также хорошее знание детективной литературы. Ведь героиням во всех делах помогают Шерлок Холмс, Отец Браун и другие известные детективы из произведений классической литературы.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: 5 минут тишины. Новые горизонты
programme.desc: Спасатели отряда 42-21 получают временное назначение в Ульяновск. Свадьба Лины и Грека снова срывается, а Шимко с удочеренной девочкой решает переехать в Анапу. Гиреев обещает попросить перевод, чтобы воссоединиться с семьей. Но героям некогда решать личные проблемы: прямо перед отъездом им приходится спасать дайвера, который нашел клад в затопленной старой усадьбе на дне реки и застрял под упавшей плитой…

programme.title: Ольга
programme.desc: Главная героиня воспитывает двух детей от разных браков, заботится об отце-алкоголике и пытается наладить личную жизнь. Старшая дочь Анька учится в ПТУ, думает, что она единственный адекватный член семьи и в её жизни все будет по-другому, младший сын Тимофей, чей отец вернулся к первой семье в Азербайджан, считает, что он уже мужчина, хотя ему всего лишь 11 лет, отец Ольги, бывший футболист, крепко выпивает и постоянно врет, а сестра Ленка пытается жить за счет мужчин, в основном — женатых. programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Первые ласточки
programme.desc: Одноклассники уверены, что Масло, Федя и Катя виновны в смерти Полины, и хотят отомстить. Во время допроса Федя рассказывает, как на самом деле погиб его брат Саша и кто ещё об этом знает. Кто-то подбрасывает Лере фото Полины, которая спрятала по школе свои послания.
