programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Lost Cities combines hi-tech archaeology, breath-taking visuals and genuine exploration to make headline-grabbing discoveries. Lost Cities brings adventure, science and archaeology together through our host Albert Lin. Our ambitious approach applies 3D scanning to some of the most extraordinary sites of antiquity. This series will deliver powerful, emotional stories with hi-tech imagery to bring the mysteries of the past vividly to life.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air France Flight #296 (Airbus A320) June 26th, 1988 The Airbus A-320 the worlds most sophisticated passenger jet takes off for its maiden passenger flight and first-ever public demonstration. The plane is headed for the Habsheim Air Show where the pilots are planning a breathtaking, low-altitude fly-over. But after getting into position over the tiny airfield the exhibition turns to disaster. The plane plows into a forest and is consumed by flames. It is a horrible tragedy, and a public relations nightmare for Airbus. With such a huge investment on the line, there is enormous pressure on investigators to determine whether the pilot or the plane was at fault.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Margot heads out, in search of bear - but ends up face to face with an even more formidable force of nature. Billy takes advantage of warmer weather and begins work on some much-needed cabin upgrades. Matty goes full "hillbilly" with his plans for the ultimate backwoods deep freeze; And Emilie and Gilbert get to work on a "Shabotwan" - a traditional structure they to hope to finish before the spring goose hunt begins.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot, caught off guard by an unplanned litter of puppies, prepares to leave her Yukon trapline early. In need of metal for his new forge, Billy embarks on a backwoods salvage mission. With their supply of meat running low, Emilie and Gilbert hit the trail for a late-season caribou hunt, and in an effort to embrace his new island lifestyle to the fullest, Matty takes to sea and tries his hand at scallop fishing.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: During the night-time rush hour, Air Traffic Controller George Perkins gets the call all controllers dread: a plane needs to make an emergency landing at Dubai after an engine shutdown. He has to clear the runway and scramble the emergency services for a landing that could shutter the airport. Airport Services Manager Mel Sabharwal is called in to find out why a transit passenger has live snakes in her bag. In preparation for an ambitious programme of runway repairs, Jumah Al-Mazrooie inspects the overspill airport and finds dangerous debris, storm drains full of sand, and a CCTV system that isn't working. Customs Officers detain a suspicious passenger and find 14kg of heroin secreted in the lining of his suitcase. And Carl Perkins has to avoid damaging expensive cars while loading them into a plane's cargo hold.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Firefighters rush to the aid of a 777 full of passengers that touches down with smoking landing gear; a man loses his son in the world's biggest airport terminal just minutes before their plane is due to depart; two passengers arrive at Customs with bags stuffed full of the most expensive wood in the world; staff at the airport's exclusive VIP Service prepare for the arrival of footballing legend Pele; and the airport engineering team gears up for a construction project that will put the whole airport's operation and reputation on the line.

programme.title: Lost Temple of the Inca
programme.desc: Legendary archeologist Johan Reinhard spent his career searching for the lost temples of the Inca Empire, discovering all but one: Ausangate, named after one of the most sacred mountains in Peru. Now in his seventies, he's handed the torch to environmental scientist Preston Sowell, who makes a mysterious discovery at an alpine lake near Mt Ausangate that he believes is the lost temple. This film follows Sowell's journey of discovery, loss and adventure as he seeks the truth about this sacred place.

programme.title: Lost Cities with Albert Lin
programme.desc: Lost Cities combines hi-tech archaeology, breath-taking visuals and genuine exploration to make headline-grabbing discoveries. Lost Cities brings adventure, science and archaeology together through our host Albert Lin. Our ambitious approach applies 3D scanning to some of the most extraordinary sites of antiquity. This series will deliver powerful, emotional stories with hi-tech imagery to bring the mysteries of the past vividly to life.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: En route to the Shetland Islands, a high-tech turboprop is struck by lightning, temporarily blinding the crew and disabling their controls. The pilots declare a Mayday as the plane plunges into a terrifying nosedive. Just seconds before impact, they manage to regain control. And once they're safely on the ground, investigators uncover an unusual feature in the plane that plays a key role in this calamity.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on one of the most iconic cars to have ever come out of Germany, a BMW E30 Alpina. The car belongs to car obsessive Maz, a town planner from Walsall, whose dream to restore the car came to an end when he was struck down with a near fatal genetic disorder. Once the car arrives at the workshop not only do the boys discover that it's full of rot, but that it might not actually be the special edition it proports to be. Alpina or not Alpina - that is the question!

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take a trip back in time in a Fiesta XR2,a fast Ford from the 1980s and the car that Fuzz learned to drive in. The car belongs to Brian, who planned to restore the car to show winning condition, however when he started suffering from health problems the project ground to a halt. Brian's family contacted Car SOS hoping that a fully restored XR2 would bring a ray of sunshine into his life.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Maya Snake Kings
programme.desc: Fascinating documentary series from National Geographic that sheds new light on the mystifying Maya civilisation. With astounding new evidence, scientists, archaeologists and historians have uncovered the complexity and advancement of this Central American civilisation, which lived across southeastern Mexico, Belize, Honduras, El Salvador and Guatemala. These experts have used advanced technology to scour the jungles of Guatemala, discovering approximately 60,000 new structures that reveal the meandering network of infrastructure which connected the Maya people. One of the ruling dynasties of this ancient era were the Snake Kings, who until recently were unknown. These intriguing new discoveries reveal the extent of the Snake Kings power as they even conquered Tikal, the greatest city in Mayan history.

programme.title: Cleopatra's Final Secret
programme.desc: Archaeologist Kathleen Martinez is leading a thrilling detective hunt on land and underwater, to unearth the final pieces of the puzzle that will unlock the story of Cleopatra's last days. Armed with the latest technology and the unparalleled skills of explorer Bob Ballard, she is guaranteed to make extraordinary discoveries. This could be the find of the century: Cleopatra's Lost Tomb.

programme.title: The Fall Of Osama Bin Laden
programme.desc: Journalist Peter Bergen returns to investigate the United States intelligence operation to hunt down and kill the world's most wanted terrorist. Take a deep dive into critical intel gathered by Navy SEALs on hard drives and in a collection of letters and journals confiscated from bin Laden's Abbottabad compound.

programme.title: Inside North Korea: The Kim Dynasty
programme.desc: The final episode starts with the death of Kim Jong Il and the rise of the new leader of North Korea - his son, Kim Jong Un, taking power at the age of 28. Using exclusive interviews, firsthand testimony and expertly curated archive, "Rocket Man" charts Un's reign from 2011 to present day; delves into how Un consolidated power, by killing his uncle and his half-brother; examines the incredible story of his unexpected friendship with basketball star Dennis Rodman; retells his announcing that he has nuclear weapons that can reach the United States; and breaks down the historic 2018 summit with US President Trump.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: A double life within a double life: A former CIA chief of base utilizes her knowledge of covert exfiltration and the connections she made while working as one of America's top spies to help rescue vulnerable people during the chaos following the 2021 U.S. withdrawal from Afghanistan. Tapping into years of covert experience, she stepped out of retirement and into action to try and save as many lives as she could.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: Tracking the butcher: A father's mission to bring justice to one of the most feared members of the Taliban reaches a turning point when a teenage boy within his inner circle is captured during a raid. With this unexpected breakthrough and the aid of the CIA's most advanced covert tracking technology, agents close in on the elusive figure known as "The Butcher." What began as a distant mission for justice now inches toward a final resolution.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: September 1, 1983 Korean Air Lines Flight #007 is high above the Sea of Japan with 269 people on board. Hoping to save fuel during the last leg of its marathon flight from New York to Seoul, it requests permission to fly at a higher altitude. When the aircraft reaches its new altitude, however, it is rocked by rapid decompression, spirals out of control and crashes into the sea. An international controversy erupts, and within days, Soviet officials admit to shooting down the passenger plane. With Cold War tensions at an all-time high, its up to international investigators to keep two superpowers at bay. But can they prevent an all-out armed conflict, and can they determine what went wrong?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." To this day, the elders on Easter Island claim their ancestors came from a continent called Hiva, believed to have sunk after a great disaster. Now, new scientific evidence points to a remote island chain in Polynesia as the center of an ancient, thriving civilization. For over 400 years these islands have been known as the Marquesas Archipelago, but before that the native Polynesians called them simply "The Isles of Hiva". Could they be a remnant of the lost continent of Hiva? Using new archeological and geological evidence together with oral tradition and voyaging techniques passed down for centuries, we are unveiling The Lost Continent Of The Pacific: a world of water and exploration, of human sacrifice and epic voyagers who had settled the largest ocean on Earth centuries before Columbus reached America.

programme.title: Atlantis Rising
programme.desc: Executive Produced by James Cameron, "Atlantis Discovered" is a 1x120 detective thriller that seeks out, uncovers and explores artifacts such as archaeological finds, satellite photographs, manuscripts hiding in plain sight, underwater exploration, etc. and attempt to "decode" the artifacts as springboards to further the investigation to get to the bottom of the story.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: On the west coast of Puerto Rico, Air and Marine Operations chase down and arrest smugglers caught tossing bales of cocaine overboard. At the Fort Lauderdale Airport, U.S. Customs and Border Protection seizes over a thousand hydrocodone pills from an airline pilot returning from Colombia. At Atlanta International Airport, CBP consults with archaeologists to verify the authenticity of several artifacts they suspect were looted.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: The U.S. Coast Guard stops smugglers with over 13,000 kilos of cocaine at sea and transfers custody to Homeland Security Investigations for prosecution. At Dulles International Airport, near the nation's capital, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officers uncover weapons heading outbound during checks for unreported currency. In El Paso, CBP Agricultural Specialists inspect live and deceased animals to protect the U.S. from foreign diseases, like avian flu.

programme.title: Inside the CIA: Secrets and Spies
programme.desc: From CIA wife to CIA spy: The widow of a CIA officer, who was killed in action, chooses to take up the mantle, becoming the first woman to go undercover in Moscow and handle one of the most important Russian sources of the Cold War.

programme.title: Airport Security: Brazil
programme.desc: Federal Police at Sao Paolo International Airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. Their main threat, cocaine smuggling. Agents arrest two different traffickers with bricks of cocaine branded in the same curious way. One of those loads is among the largest of the last few years. Panicked asylum seekers refuse to cooperate, causing an uproar. And suitcases carrying hundreds of counterfeit goods are intercepted.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes a break from the rigors of the trapline and gets busy preparing for another summer hunting season, horseback- style. Matty "forges" ahead with another big backwoods project and takes on some even bigger life changes. Billy attempts to rehabilitate a forgotten old friend to help him embark on a new adventure, and, despite a recent dump of spring snow, Emilie and Gilbert lay the groundwork for a little bit of backcountry luxury.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Margot takes advantage of the milder Yukon weather and tries her hand at a few new wilderness DIY projects; In the hopes of making his life in the bush "easier" - Matty digs deep - and searches for a less labor-intensive source of water. To accommodate the arrival of a few "four-legged" friends, Billy works on upgrading his backwoods property; And Emilie and Gilbert head into the wilds of Ontario - on the hunt for a source of spring-time sustenance.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: A new plane park has been created to house a fleet of Boeing 777s during the airport's 80 day, billion dollar runway upgrade project, but there is a massive slope to get in and out of it. Pushback Operator Mark Dearden's skills are put to the test as he finds out if he can tow a 300 ton plane down the entry slope without careering out of control. Customs Officers find five huge packages hidden in the bottom of a passenger's luggage. If the powder inside tests positive for heroin, it'll be the biggest drugs haul at the airport in 10 years. And Line Maintenance Engineer Andy Tetley is called onto a plane with a defunct air conditioning system and a temperature of over 110 degrees. He has only a few hours to find out what is wrong and cool it down before it's due to take off.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: More than a million passengers pass through Dubai International Airport every week. Behind the scenes 60,000 people from across the globe are hard at work. From ensuring the safety of the runway surface to dealing with drunken passengers, this episode of "Ultimate Airport" offers a rare chance to get to know the unsung men and women carrying out the often overlooked but vital tasks that make this multi-billion dollar airport run smoothly.

programme.title: Lost Continent of the Pacific
programme.desc: Legends of lost civilizations have captivated people throughout time. During the Age of Discovery, explorers searched the Pacific in vain for a mysterious land they called "terra incognita" or "unknown land." To this day, the elders on Easter Island claim their ancestors came from a continent called Hiva, believed to have sunk after a great disaster. Now, new scientific evidence points to a remote island chain in Polynesia as the center of an ancient, thriving civilization. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of history's most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Ireland doesn't take up much room on the map, but few places have such a celebrated identity; over 70 million people around the world claim Irish heritage. Hannah Fry goes beyond the pubs and parades to discover what it really means to be Irish today. Along the windswept coast of Donegal Bay, she dives into Ireland's surprising surfing scene, where dramatic geology is forging a new bond with the sea. She places a bet at the Punchestown races, exploring how a connection to the land became a multi-billion Euro industry. In a moment of personal discovery, Hannah uncovers her own Irish DNA and how her family history holds clues to Irish identity. As her journey ends, Hannah steps into the spotlight to try her hand at one of Ireland's most cherished traditions: storytelling.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits Iceland to discover how this stark, treeless island became a global success story. On the geologically active Reykjanes Peninsula, she meets scientists whose lava-flow predictions saved the world-famous Blue Lagoon spa from destruction, and in Hengill she sees how a futuristic algae farm is fuelled by geothermal power - and imagination. A dip in the country's oldest swimming pool reveals how Iceland's unusually small gene pool is helping advance global health, while a horseback ride across a black sand landscape immortalised in the Icelandic sagas shows how Viking heritage continues to inspire creativity. The Icelanders Hannah encounters don't just live on the land; they negotiate with it. Their collective determination and adaptability has forged an island of ideas - and a tourist magnet the world cannot resist.

programme.title: Ghost Ships of the Great Lakes: Lost Beneath the Waves
programme.desc: The tempestuous Great Lakes are full of wrecks lost to the depths and time. In this update, new science reveals some of the exciting Great Lakes ship discoveries over the last decade, and allows for the exploration and recovery of recently discovered wrecks, including a mysterious group of ships that haven't been seen since 1914.

programme.title: Endurance
programme.desc: In a legendary feat of leadership and perseverance, Antarctic explorer Ernest Shackleton kept his crew alive for over a year despite losing their ship in frigid pack ice. A century later, a team of explorers sets out to find the sunken ship. These landmark expeditions, bound by shared grit and determination, bookend one of history's greatest sagas of survival and the power of the human spirit.

programme.title: The Lost Tomb of Alexander the Great
programme.desc: Archaeologist Pepi Papakosta is on a mission to find Alexander the Great's lost tomb. Excavating in a public garden in the center of the city he founded 2300 years ago, Alexandria, Egypt, she has discovered a rare, marble statue of Alexander, Greek treasures, and secret tunnels. But Pepi's biggest find is an extraordinary discovery even she was not expecting.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: Space shuttle Columbia, the Deepwater Horizon oil rig, and the Fukushima Daiichi nuclear power plant are three major disasters linked to engineering and design flaws. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design choices that turned failures into catastrophes. What turned Columbia's return into a disaster? Why didn't the oil rig's final defenses hold? And how did a massive wave defeat emergency backups?

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italy's iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Making a routine journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. It is one of the last planes scheduled to land. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway. They decide to abort the maneuver and apply full power to all four engines in order to get their jet to climb. But they are too late. The aircraft clips the treetops below and crashes into a hillside. Investigators comb through the wreckage, and the data from the plane's black boxes. But they would only solve the riddle of Crossair Flight 3597 by digging into the past.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The Inca Empire rose in the 15th century, yet its origins remained shrouded in mystery for centuries. Follow Manco Capac, the first Inca and Pachacutec, the mythical emperor who reshaped a civilization. Pachacutec built Machu Picchu, revolutionized architecture, and drew on the legacy of an older society to rewrite his people's history. Claiming the title "Son of the Sun," he expanded the empire beyond the Cuzco Valley, imposed a solar cult as the state religion, and even instituted human sacrifices to assert his power. With cutting-edge science and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Machu Picchu to Chilean volcanoes, Lake Titicaca, and Cuzco, witness the breathtaking birth of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: In less than a century, the Incas built monumental remains throughout their vast empire, but the secrets of their lightning-fast expansion remained unknown for centuries. Under the conqueror Tupac Yupanqui, the empire grew through force and clever alliances. He led the greatest territorial expansion of the Inca realm. He subdued the Incas' fiercest rivals along the Pacific coast. From Cuzco, the heart of his empire, he also established a vast imperial administration, supported by a 40,000-kilometer road network, custom-built administrative centers, and a curious accounting system based on knotted strings. Thanks to the latest scientific advances and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Cuzco to the Atacama Desert, via the Pacific coast, this is the lightning expansion of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Megastructures: Sagrada Familia is an inside look at one of the most clever and inspiring structures in Europe. The long life of its construction allows to show from traditional architectural construction techniques to the use of recent science and technology breakthroughs, including architectural 3D visualization. Sagrada Familia represents the harmony between the old and the new, between the constructors of medieval cathedrals and geniuses of postmodernism.

programme.title: Megastructures
programme.desc: Exciting documentary series that shows viewers some extreme and extraordinary construction projects- the biggest, tallest, longest or deepest in the world, and the machines that are used to create such amazing structures. The series features interviews with designers and project managers, who present the problems of construction and the methodology or techniques used to overcome obstacles. Some ''megastructures'' included in the series are US Navy's aircraft carrier, the USS Ronald Reagan, highway with no speed limit built in Germany, undersea tunnel built between France and United Kingdom, world's longest suspension bridge in Japan, twin tower skyscraper in Kuala Lumpur, etc.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Airport workers find lost items, including a purse stuffed with jewelry, two competitive ballroom dresses, a headphone case holding $1,200 and a mysterious matching set of luggage stuffed with produce. In Alabama, an avid Unclaimed Baggage shopper shares some of her greatest finds, including a diamond ring she bought for $4,500 that's now worth $20,000.

programme.title: Inside Airport: Lost & Found
programme.desc: Airport workers go above and beyond to find a cat who escaped onto the runway upon landing. Lost and Found agents attempt to reunite travelers with a pair of memorial bracelets honoring a fallen service member, a bobblehead revering an iconic heavy metal band, and a mysterious bag with a personal "toy" tucked inside. The Unclaimed Baggage store receives a Fendi dress that could be worth $19K.

programme.title: Engineering by Catastrophe
programme.desc: Just sending humans into space is a highly risky mission. Positioned on a rocket, astronauts must survive the controlled explosion that launches their spacecraft beyond the atmosphere and the terrifying frictional force during reentry. It's an unforgiving environment where minor errors have caused deadly and costly catastrophes. To future-proof their new deep-space capsule, Orion, NASA engineers must forensically examine every past disaster. From the devastating space shuttle explosions to the Apollo and Soyuz tragedies, yesterday's failures are vital lessons learned. Shaping new survival suits, improving escape systems and innovating new materials make space travel safer than ever before.

programme.title: Engineering by Catastrophe
programme.desc: Tunnels can save money, time and the environment. They provide a shortcut through difficult-to-navigate landscapes, but tunnels themselves can be dangerous. In the worst-case scenario, a tunnel can turn into a tomb. And today's tunnels are longer, deeper and more daring than ever before. Examine two European mega projects: the longest underground rail excavation, the Brenner Bass Tunnel, and the world's longest immersed tunnel, the Fehmarnbelt link. As they break records and push boundaries, how can engineers use past disasters to make their tunnels safer for construction workers and motorists?

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The Inca Empire rose in the 15th century, yet its origins remained shrouded in mystery for centuries. Follow Manco Capac, the first Inca and Pachacutec, the mythical emperor who reshaped a civilization. Pachacutec built Machu Picchu, revolutionized architecture, and drew on the legacy of an older society to rewrite his people's history. Claiming the title "Son of the Sun," he expanded the empire beyond the Cuzco Valley, imposed a solar cult as the state religion, and even instituted human sacrifices to assert his power. With cutting-edge science and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Machu Picchu to Chilean volcanoes, Lake Titicaca, and Cuzco, witness the breathtaking birth of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: In less than a century, the Incas built monumental remains throughout their vast empire, but the secrets of their lightning-fast expansion remained unknown for centuries. Under the conqueror Tupac Yupanqui, the empire grew through force and clever alliances. He led the greatest territorial expansion of the Inca realm. He subdued the Incas' fiercest rivals along the Pacific coast. From Cuzco, the heart of his empire, he also established a vast imperial administration, supported by a 40,000-kilometer road network, custom-built administrative centers, and a curious accounting system based on knotted strings. Thanks to the latest scientific advances and ultra-realistic 3D reconstructions from Cuzco to the Atacama Desert, via the Pacific coast, this is the lightning expansion of the Empire of the Sun.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Making a routine journey from Berlin, Crossair Flight #3597 is on its final approach to Zurich. It is one of the last planes scheduled to land. But just minutes before landing the pilots cannot find the runway. They decide to abort the maneuver and apply full power to all four engines in order to get their jet to climb. But they are too late. The aircraft clips the treetops below and crashes into a hillside. Investigators comb through the wreckage, and the data from the plane's black boxes. But they would only solve the riddle of Crossair Flight 3597 by digging into the past.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Facing a spate of thunderstorms, Margot makes one final, all out push to complete her Yukon dream home. Billy builds a backwoods BBQ - the last step in his goal to turn his simple abode into the perfect wilderness homestead. With summer right around the corner, Matty takes steps to "up" his waterfront "game". And Emilie and Gilbert battle late season snows as they rush to complete their backcountry cabin before some very special guests arrive.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: With warmer weather just around the corner, Margot and Alex hit the trail to begin their summer horse guiding season. Billy gives his newly refurbished boat the ultimate sea-worthiness test on the mighty St. Lawrence River. Matty and Kelly take another step toward complete self-sufficiency with the addition of some "ovine" friends, and despite late-season snow, Emilie and Gilbert redouble their efforts to complete a family-friendly hunting camp.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: To maintain its place as one of the busiest airports in the world, Dubai International needs to run like clockwork. Failure in any single department can have major consequences across the whole airport. This episode follows an emergency in air traffic control that leads to a runway closure, a huge task to re-number every departure gate in the airport while it is operational, and the mounting tension on the building site of a new $3.2 billion terminal extension - built specifically to accommodate the A380, the world's biggest passenger airliner.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: In this episode, an incoming aircraft with a hydraulics problem threatens to bring every flight to a halt; 40,000 thousand feet above a virtual Dubai, two trainee A380 pilots simulate an almost identical emergency; an inspection of the upgraded Southern runway delays the re-opening - bad news for the airport's billion dollar engineering programme and recording artist Cat Stevens is at risk of missing a crucial flight to New York to be inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame, all because of a computer problem at the Departure Gate.

programme.title: Incas: The Rise and Fall
programme.desc: The Inca Empire rose in the 15th century, yet its origins remained shrouded in mystery for centuries. Follow Manco Capac, the first Inca and Pachacutec, the mythical emperor who reshaped a civilization. programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: In picturesque rural Nebraska, husband and wife veterinary team Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder live and work at the center of America's food chain, where the livelihoods of Midwestern farmers connect to families nationwide. Along with their two sons, Charlie and Chase, the Schroeder family is always on the go as their veterinary practice cares for the region's many animals in need. From winter blizzards to spring tornadoes and blistering summer heat waves, Drs. Ben and Erin overcome the obstacles with skill and heart.

programme.title: Heartland Docs
programme.desc: In picturesque rural Nebraska, husband and wife veterinary team Drs. Ben and Erin Schroeder live and work at the center of America's food chain, where the livelihoods of Midwestern farmers connect to families nationwide. Along with their two sons, Charlie and Chase, the Schroeder family is always on the go as their veterinary practice cares for the region's many animals in need. From winter blizzards to spring tornadoes and blistering summer heat waves, Drs. Ben and Erin overcome the obstacles with skill and heart.

programme.title: Winter's Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: Winter pushes wildlife to the extreme. For some, it is a chance to thrive; for others, the only way to escape the icy hold of winter is to shut down every physical system. When spring finally comes, it is a time for celebration for those who managed to survive the most brutal of seasons.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, nor any darker than Alaska in winter. It's not a place you mess with, unless you've got a wild side. As winter breaks, carnivores emerge on Alaska's wide-open spaces, leaving prey animals no place to hide. Wolves chase caribou with ferocious intensity, brown bears battle for rights to a buffet and wolverines make short work of prey 100 times their size. Alaska's deadliest thrive in one of America's last wild frontiers.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: The biggest state in the union is also home to some of the deadliest predators. Alaska is one of the few remaining true wildernesses left on the planet. With its harsh environment, extreme cold and constant winter darkness it is not a place for the fainthearted. As springtime buds and the sun raises its head above the horizon, the state's predatory carnivores emerge on to the vast landscapes to hunt for food, with wolves, brown bears and wolverines dispatching prey with ease. In the waters along the coastline, giant orcas and salmon sharks track and kill their quarry while tiny terrors hide in the channels and make good use of their venomous attacks.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how polar bears hunt prey, offering new perspectives on the tactics they use to track, stalk and ambush seals, whales and walruses. We follow a mother fighting to feed her two cubs in the harsh polar extremes, and a young male driven by starvation to tackle enormous prey.

programme.title: Australia's Land of the Ancients
programme.desc: Australias Land of the Ancients explores the unique and ancient landscape of northeastern Australia, the most biodiverse region on the continent. From Crocodiles lying in wait for fish and hunting feral pigs to caring marsupial mothers of the far north, the film highlights some of the incredible species as they struggle to survive in their harsh environment amid a changing landscape.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: North America doesn't get much colder, nor any darker than Alaska in winter. It's not a place you mess with, unless you've got a wild side. As winter breaks, carnivores emerge on Alaska's wide-open spaces, leaving prey animals no place to hide. Wolves chase caribou with ferocious intensity, brown bears battle for rights to a buffet and wolverines make short work of prey 100 times their size. Alaska's deadliest thrive in one of America's last wild frontiers.

programme.title: Alaska's Deadliest: Predator Prowl
programme.desc: The biggest state in the union is also home to some of the deadliest predators. Alaska is one of the few remaining true wildernesses left on the planet. With its harsh environment, extreme cold and constant winter darkness it is not a place for the fainthearted. As springtime buds and the sun raises its head above the horizon, the state's predatory carnivores emerge on to the vast landscapes to hunt for food, with wolves, brown bears and wolverines dispatching prey with ease. In the waters along the coastline, giant orcas and salmon sharks track and kill their quarry while tiny terrors hide in the channels and make good use of their venomous attacks.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: It's summer in Michigan, which means time to bale some hay! It's a grueling process, but Dr. Pol, Charles, and Ben manage to mow their hayfield, which is the first step in baling. But a surprise rainstorm could ruin this year's hay haul. They hope for sun, so their crop doesn't spoil before they can bale. Meanwhile, the Pol's bring in their next animal to the farm - an emu!

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: It's the county fair season! The Pol's plan to get at least two cows and six sheep at the auction, but they have a lot to do before that can happen. First up, they must install a new perimeter fence. Charles and Ben think they are off to a good start, but when Dr. Pol points out how sneaky sheep can be, their workload doubles. Meanwhile, Beth is hoping for a goat at the small animal auction.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soil's surface. A worm explodes from the seabed to yank fish into its mucky pit; a beetle tunnels deep into warm, wet dung; and a miniature digger excavates miles of tunnel with its teeth! Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers
programme.desc: Great white sharks, polar bears, lions and brown bears battle rivals and the elements to maintain their positions at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Animal Faces
programme.desc: Majestic animals we deem beautiful are well documented. Their stories are celebrated while we appropriate their regality, elegance and grace to adorn our company logos, be our sporting mascots and represent our families on crests. Then there's the other animals, the aesthetic outsiders we don't consider cute or cuddly. The critters we tend to laugh at or revile simply because they don't fit into what we deem as beautiful. The animals selected by natural selection to be beaten with the ugly stick. This is the time for the World's Weirdest Animal Faces to shine! A celebration of respectable irreverence, revealing the extraordinarily weird features these creatures possess.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. programme.title: Planet Carnivore: Perfect Killers
programme.desc: Great white sharks, polar bears, lions and brown bears battle rivals and the elements to maintain their positions at the top of the food chain.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Whale
programme.desc: Intelligent, cultured and deadly, the killer whale dominates every ocean on earth and as our planet changes, this top predator changes with it. They are elite, marine hunters with an extremely diverse diet including other apex predators like the great white shark. Killer whales pursue their prey like a pack of wolves and have multiple killing techniques.

programme.title: Jaguar: Jungle Icon of Guyana
programme.desc: A young jaguar is about to embark on the most important mission of his life, : to strike out and find a kingdom of his own. His journey will take him through varied habitats, each with its own cast of animals. Only if he can prove his worth will the jaguar be able to claim his throne in one of the last truly wild paradises on the planet.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Gaze into the realm of gulpers: animals who waste no time eating their prey — often swallowing it whole. Something deadly lies silent in the leaf litter of West Africa. The Gaboon viper is loaded with the largest fangs and fastest strike of any snake. Further south, the solifuge, or sun spider, darts through the desert, seeking an unlucky bug to mince with its massive mandibles. Strange mouths are also in the ocean. The moray eel is a bizarre fish, but its most characteristic charm is hiding down its dark throat. These and more lie in store.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soil's surface. Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. programme.title: World's Weirdest
programme.desc: World's Weirdest is a documentary series revolving around the strangest, freakiest, weirdest animals and their behaviors in the animal kingdom. Take this amazing journey to the animal world and have a look at creatures who survive in extreme environments, alien-looking body parts and camouflage, fish that can change its sex, toads that explode, koalas and their disgusting diet and all kinds of other weirdest creatures Mother Nature has to offer.

programme.title: South America's Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Survival is a daunting proposition. But when the going gets tough, the wild inhabitants morph into oddballs. Millennia of weird evolution have made this giant continent a land of mutants. Expect the unexpected because here, outlandish is the new normal.

Killer whales pursue their prey like a pack of wolves and have multiple killing techniques.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol's need to break ground for a new outbuilding that will house incoming livestock and Charles has dreamt up an outrageous idea of what that structure can be - and it just may be just crazy enough to work. At the auction, the Pol's are hoping to purchase sheep and cows, but the skyrocketing bids threaten their big plans.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The bidding is live at the large animal auction! The Pol's are working towards their goal of bringing home sheep and cows to their farm. Any animals they win will be delivered to the farm in just three days, so the pressure is on to get the sheep hut finished in time - and there is a ton left to do. Meanwhile, Beth and Charles are concerned about the low activity in their beehives.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkey's Long Tale
programme.desc: The Nicobar Islands were significantly impacted by the massive tsunami of 2004. This documentary is a compelling exploration of nature's ability to adapt to millions of years of gradual tectonic change and a sudden natural disaster, and a journey into a world few people are fortunate enough to see.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to Vietnam's mountainous forests to discover endangered pangolins, Asian palm civets, and the golden-headed langurs of Cat Ba Island. The recently discovered Vietnamese crocodile lizard is already vulnerable to smuggling, while the critically endangered Delacour's langurs take refuge in a nature reserve. In springtime, an astonishing diversity of butterfly species congregates in the forest.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkey's Long Tale
programme.desc: The Nicobar Islands were significantly impacted by the massive tsunami of 2004. This documentary is a compelling exploration of nature's ability to adapt to millions of years of gradual tectonic change and a sudden natural disaster, and a journey into a world few people are fortunate enough to see.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continent's most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Jaguars vs. Crocs
programme.desc: Veteran wildlife photographer Steve Winter and cameraman Bertie Gregory capture the remarkable lives of Jaguars in the Pantanal of Brazil. A mother jaguar teaches her cub survival while a determined male jaguar named Scarface dives headfirst into the river to tackle the deadliest of opponents - 6-foot long caiman. Clever capybaras and playful giant otters stick with their family members to avoid being jaguar dinner.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to Vietnam's mountainous forests to discover endangered pangolins, Asian palm civets, and the golden-headed langurs of Cat Ba Island. The recently discovered Vietnamese crocodile lizard is already vulnerable to smuggling, while the critically endangered Delacour's langurs take refuge in a nature reserve. In springtime, an astonishing diversity of butterfly species congregates in the forest.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Exploring Vietnams Mekong Delta, home to macaques, turtles, and crocodiles.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Sierra Morena is a mountain range of climatic extremes. The harsh winter puts the lynxes of the Jandula River Valley to the test. Golden eagles, otters, wild boars and cormorants struggle to survive in the land of the Iberian lynx.

programme.title: Land of the Iberian Lynx
programme.desc: Spring rains bring new opportunities and hope to the land of the Iberian lynx. But for the female lynxes of the valley, it is always a challenge to raise their cubs. The series follows the lynxes in their struggle for survival, from the thrill of the hunt to the tender moments of parenting, and also witnesses their coexistence with other animals like majestic golden eagles or powerful deer.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkey's Long Tale
programme.desc: The Nicobar Islands were significantly impacted by the massive tsunami of 2004. programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how Nile crocodiles hunt, offering new perspectives on the patient and precise tactics they use when ambushing migratory herds of wildebeest and zebra that pass through their territories. A male crocodile must target large prey in a bid to survive the harshest time of the year.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how lions hunt large prey like buffalo and zebra, offering new perspectives on the way these predators stalk, chase and kill. A lone lioness relies on cunning to feed her newborn cubs, whilst a fearless pride tries to take down the biggest prey of all, a giant African elephant.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkey's Long Tale
programme.desc: The Nicobar Islands were significantly impacted by the massive tsunami of 2004. This documentary is a compelling exploration of nature's ability to adapt to millions of years of gradual tectonic change and a sudden natural disaster, and a journey into a world few people are fortunate enough to see.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how Nile crocodiles hunt, offering new perspectives on the patient and precise tactics they use when ambushing migratory herds of wildebeest and zebra that pass through their territories. A male crocodile must target large prey in a bid to survive the harshest time of the year.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Exploring Vietnams Mekong Delta, home to macaques, turtles, and crocodiles.

programme.title: Predator v Prey
programme.desc: A forensic look at how Nile crocodiles hunt, offering new perspectives on the patient and precise tactics they use when ambushing migratory herds of wildebeest and zebra that pass through their territories. A male crocodile must target large prey in a bid to survive the harshest time of the year.

programme.title: Wild Vietnam
programme.desc: Travel to Vietnam's mountainous forests to discover endangered pangolins, Asian palm civets, and the golden-headed langurs of Cat Ba Island. The recently discovered Vietnamese crocodile lizard is already vulnerable to smuggling, while the critically endangered Delacour's langurs take refuge in a nature reserve. In springtime, an astonishing diversity of butterfly species congregates in the forest.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Wild Hunters: Deadly Killers of Africa
programme.desc: Journey across Africa exploring the continent's most iconic and deadliest predators. These African stories are a show of raw power, strength and endurance. An awe-inspiring display of the fierce, everyday battles fought in the wild.

programme.title: Jaguars vs. Crocs
programme.desc: Veteran wildlife photographer Steve Winter and cameraman Bertie Gregory capture the remarkable lives of Jaguars in the Pantanal of Brazil. A mother jaguar teaches her cub survival while a determined male jaguar named Scarface dives headfirst into the river to tackle the deadliest of opponents - 6-foot long caiman. Clever capybaras and playful giant otters stick with their family members to avoid being jaguar dinner.

programme.title: Nicobar Islands: A Monkey's Long Tale
programme.desc: The Nicobar Islands were significantly impacted by the massive tsunami of 2004. This documentary is a compelling exploration of nature's ability to adapt to millions of years of gradual tectonic change and a sudden natural disaster, and a journey into a world few people are fortunate enough to see.

programme.title: Return of the Predators
programme.desc: After 30 years of war and destruction, Gorongosa National Park in Mozambique has undergone a remarkable restoration. Herbivores once again bound across the plains, but hunters have been slower to return, leaving the park out of balance...until now!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbamazuļi atrod ziloņu mazuli un slepeni par to rūpējas. Kā Barbatētis un Barbamamma reaģēs uz Borisu? Zilonis Boriss ilgojas pēc mājām. Barbapapas nolemj vest viņu atpakaļ uz Āfriku. Turpat viņi palīdz Borisam pielāgoties.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbavecāki ir pārsteigti, redzot arvien vairāk reklāmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Motorei vajag palīdzību ugunsdzēsēju depo, pilsētā ierodas jauns ugunsdzēsēju kapteinis, lai apmācītu visus ķepaiņus. Čārdžers grib palīdzēt Sjerrai Spīdošajai ar viņas jauno šovu, bet viņa savainotā ķepa izraisa konusveidīgus sarežģījumus.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī apmetas migrējošu pīļu bars. Rabla komandai jāpalīdz pīlēm uzsākt ceļu uz dienvidiem. Motore nevēlas doties pie dakteres Divas uz veterināro klīniku... tāpēc ķepaiņi uzbūvē īpašu, tikai viņai paredzētu telpu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ceļojumā uz Parīzi ģimene apskatīs lielisko Luvru. Diemžēl Barbalala neievēro strikto noteikumu - muzejā neēst. // Barbalala strikti ievēro ačgārnās dienas tradīcijas, kas cēlušās no seniem laikiem. Brāļi un māsas pievienojas viņai ačgārnajā dienā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija atrod pazudušu rotaļlietu un sola atgriezt to saimniekam. Kaja gaida, kad brauks ar Nebulatoru, bet Tims nav drošs. Tims un Kaja cenšas nofotografēt maldinošu Kosmosa vaboli.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Komanda Būvētavā ceļ ķenguru safari Lilijai un Lūkasam... līdz aizbēg viņu ķengurs. Ātrmeistars izaicina Rabla komandu piedalīties celtniecības sacīkstēs. Celtnieklīča pirmās Celtniecības spēles!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: No Piedzīvojumu līča atbrauc Rokijs, lai apciemotu Rabla komandu. Tieši laikā, lai redzētu Celtnieklīča jauno lācēnu! Kad reindžere Roza lūdz palīdzēt ar celtniecību, Ātrmeistars netīšām iznīcina lāču māju. Ķepaiņiem un Rokijam jāglābj situācija.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem ir garlaicīgi, jo ārā līst lietus. Bet vecāki zina, ka vajag tikai nedaudz iztēles, lai varētu izklaidēties aŗī lietū. Bērniem iztēle ir lieliska, varbūt pat pārāk... // Barbagudrais radīja dekoderi, kurš spēj iztulkot dzīvnieku skaņas, bet dzīvnieki fermā un pagalmā neko interesantu nesaka. Barbazū lūdz iztulkot okeāna iemītnieku valodu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vecākus pārsteidz aizvien vairāku reklāmas izkārtņu parādīšanās gar viņu ceļu. Gaisma no reklāmām ir tik spoža, ka naktī vairs nevar saskatīt zvaigznes un visur ir tik daudz stabu! Pietiks! Ģimenei jārīkojas! // Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū ir apņēmies viņai palīdzēt. Lai to panāktu, viņai jāiemācās aprūpēt govis un bulli. Tas nav viegli, bet, ja viņa pacentīsies, viņa būs lieliska kovbojmeitene.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija apmaldās izklaides centrā. Tims meklē jaunu, sev piemērotu raķeti. Kad Terija pieskata bērnus, Tims cenšas apiet visus noteikumus.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Trenere Karima lūdz uzbūvēt zāli vingrošanas šovam. Izrādās, ka Lilijai baļķis ir par augstu. Jādomā risinājums! Kad ceļojošais šovs netiek līdz Celtnieklīcim, kucēni rīko paši savu šovu.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Pepa ar draugiem dodas pārgājienā kopā ar Gazeles jaunkundzi. Kad satumst, viņi visi dzied pie ugunskura. Kad laiks iet gulēt, Pepa ar draugiem ir nobijušies, un visi bērni dodas gulēt Gazeles jaunkundzes teltī.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims dara visu, lai tiktu pie jaunās Dinozvaigznes figūriņas. Ir Astro-joku diena, bet Tims nezina, kad apstāties. Timam un tētim jānoķer traucējošs kurmis.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni pielipuši pie televizora, tāpēc vecāki mudina viņus veidot raidījumus. Barbapapas apmeklē evolūcijas muzeju. Programmā: Zemes radīšana, Pirmskembrija perioda zemūdene un... dinozauri!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Jaunais Fransuā pieredz Barbapapas dzimšanu.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Kad Vinstons atsakās spēlēties ar Lidiju, Deizija un Krokodilkungs rada viņai iedomu draugu. Krokodilkungs palīdz Deizijai pieskatīt Martina zivi, taču baidās, ka nespēs noturēties un apēdīs to.

Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pilsētā ierodas fermere, kas lūdz Rabla komandu uzcelt kūti viņas cūciņai. Vai suņuki paspēs to paveikt līdz lielajai Rukšu ballei? Motores īpašā dzimšanas dienas dāvana aizkavējas, jo izrādās, ka Celtnieklīcim vajadzīgs lielāks skrejceļš.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar biedriem un Liliju uzbūvē stilīgāko rotaļu laukumu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni - Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals - suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss - suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi - katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu - sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts - Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo noķer mistisku maskētu vandāli, kurš cenšas bēgt pēc mājas apzīmēšanas. Pie lietas ķeras detektīvs un doktors. // Barbabravo mīļākā mašīna pazūd no viesistabas. To meklējot Barbabravo, Barbabella un Barbagudrais zem dīvāna atrod dīvainu caurumu. Ja nu mašīna aizkrita līdz zemes centram?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabravo kā slepenais aģents vada izmeklēšanu, bruņojies ar saviem rīkiem, lai uzzinātu, kurš nozaga Barbatēta torti.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims izmēģina jaunus raķešzābakus, kas drīz kļūst nekontrolējami. Tims, Tomijs un Tija pieskata mēness papagaili. Tims, Tomijs un Tija sacenšas ar vecākiem astesbumbā.

programme.title: Ķepaiņu lietas
programme.desc: Antropomorfisku dzīvnieku pasaulē Sems Snovs un Kita Keisija ir elitāri KLEID (Slepenā dzīvnieku detektīvu ekspertu līga) aģenti, kas apceļo pasauli un risina noslēpumus, liekot lietā problēmu risināšanas un dzīvnieku faktu pārzināšanas prasmes.

programme.title: Briežu komanda
programme.desc: Tērauds sanikno smilšu krabju ģimeni, kad uztaisa milzīgu smilšu pili Stjū un Safijai. Kajs uzlabo Dženisas balss atpazīšanu. Pūču mazuļa balss kļūdas pēc uztverta kā pavēle no Aleksa, tāpēc visas viņa iekārtas sāk darboties neparasti.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa

programme.title: Bena un Hollijas mazā karaļvalsts
programme.desc: Mazā karaļvalsts varbūt nav varen milzīga, taču tā ir ļoti maģiska. Un, kā katrā kārtīgā karaļvalstī pieklājas, tai ir savs karalis un karaliene, kas dzīvo pilī kopā ar trim meitām: astoņgadīgo Holiju un mazajām dvīnēm Deiziju un Popiju. Savukārt elfi mīt Lielajā elfu kokā, kur it viss ir vienuviet: skola, bibliotēka, daudzdzīvokļu nams un pat rotaļlietu un burvju nūjiņu fabrika. Šis koks ir mājvieta arī elfiņam Benam, pasaku princeses Holijas neparastajam draugam. Abi kopā viņi nemitīgi iekuļas jautros piedzīvojumos, mācoties kopīgi sadarboties, dalīties un risināt sarežģītas situācijas.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad projektam vajadzīga palīdzība, kucēnus apciemo Skaja no Piedzīvojumu līča. Iejaucas Ātrmeistars, un Skajai ar Rabla komandu jāpieliek visi spēki, lai glābtu situāciju.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs baidās, ka tiks spiests izvēlēties starp senu labāko draugu Bazziju un jaunu labāko draudzeni Deiziju. Deizijas un Krokodilkunga vienkāršā mājiņa kokā tiek sarežģīta, kad viņi cenšas to paplašināt draugu dēļ.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērni pirmoreiz brauks ar vilcienu un nakšņos viesnīcā. Mamma būs ar viņiem, bet tētis atsevišķi vedīs paštaisītos izstrādājumus. Viņiem jāpārdod savi darbiņi ikgadējā lielajā tirdziņā, ja tētis paspēs laicīgi... // Uzsniga sniegs un bērni sarīkoja pikošanos, bet Barbabo uzcēla lielisku sniegavīru. Bet kā lai viņu saglabā, kad paliks siltāks? Sākas sacensības ar laiku...

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tēvocis Tibērijs apciemo Reksus, un Timam jāparāda, ka viņš māk uzvesties.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Tomijs dodas kempingā, bet nespēj vienoties, ar ko sākt.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Kad Tims atrod bērnības rotaļlietu Blobertu, tas atmodina viņā monstru.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pastāsta pārējiem, cik vareni bija Da Vinči izgudrojumi un nu katrs grib izgudrot ko savu. Ģēniju ir maz, bet ir jautri izgudrot. // Bērniem jāizvēlas - doties baseinā vai izbraukt ar riteņiem. Uzreiz izveidojas divas frontes un tikai Barbazū spēj nosvērt izvēles svarus.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais rada putekļu sūkšanas robotu, kas lieliski spēlē futbolu. Barbabērni sarīko spēli pret robotiem.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pirmās Celtnieklīča bibliotēkas būvēšana ir bišu pilna. Tas pieprasa īpaši saldu celtniecības risinājumu. / Vectēvs Grants māca Čārdžeram visus savus labākos deju soļus lielām deju sacensībām. Vai noklīdušas disko bumbas dēļ viņi neiegūs pirmo vietu?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Celtnieklīcī tiek uzbūvēta pirmā viesnīca, kad ciemos atbrauc fermeres Zojas brālēns Hedlijs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Sekojot iemīļotā detektīva pēdās, Barbabravo meklē noziegumu, kas jāatklāj. Vai viņš spēs atklāt noslēpumaino ledus skulptūras pazušanu? Barbabērni gatavo savu mīļāko varoņu iedvesmotus tērpus, taču varoņi neeksistē bez ļaundariem...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni laimē skārienpaliktni. Visi grab to izmantot, tāpēc čiepj viens pēc otra. Barbazū krāj ūsainu slavenību bildes. Diemžēl nekur nevar atrast pēdējo: Čārlzu Pakavu-Ūsaini. Viņam ir aizdomas par sazvērestību...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala vēlas kļūt par kovbojmeiteni un Barbazū viņai palīdzēs.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda būvē ideālu vietu, kur izrādīt Rivera dažādos foto projektus... Celtnieklīča mākslas muzeju! Fermerei Zojai ir jauna kaza! Kad viņas jaunā, dziedošā kaza pazūd, lai viņu atrastu, Rabla komandai pievienojas reindžere Roza.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda ķeras klāt savam lielākajam būvniecības projektam - debesskrāpim. Tik liela darba izpildei ir nepieciešami jauni, milzīgi braucamie. Kad Ātrmeistars ierauga ķepaiņu jaunos braucamos, viņš vēršas pie sava lielā brāļa pēc palīdzības
